markdown:
# IB French B Paper 1: Productive Skills Guide


## Structure and Format


### Time and Marks Breakdown


  * Total duration: 1 hour 15 minutes
  * Total marks: 30
      * Word count requirements:
    * SL: 250-400 words
    * HL: 450-600 words

<callout type=""></callout>

### Task Selection


  * Choose 1 out of 3 writing tasks
      1. Tasks are based on the five themes:
    2. Identities
    3. Experiences
    4. Human ingenuity
    5. Social organization
    6. Sharing the planet

## Writing Task Types


### 1. Personal Writing


  * Blogs
  * Diary entries
  * Personal letters
  * Emails

<callout type=""></callout>

### 2. Professional Writing


  * Formal letters
  * Reports
  * Articles
  * Speeches

<callout type=""></callout>

### 3. Creative Writing


  * Stories
  * Descriptive pieces
  * Magazine articles
  * Reviews

## Assessment Criteria


### 1. Language (12 marks)


  * Vocabulary range and accuracy
  * Grammatical structures
  * Spelling and punctuation

<callout type=""></callout>

### 2. Message (12 marks)


  * Task completion
  * Ideas development
  * Clarity and coherence
  * Relevance to prompt

### 3. Format (6 marks)


  * Appropriate text type conventions
  * Register (formal/informal)
  * Tone
  * Structure

## Writing Strategies


### Pre-writing


  1. Analyze the task carefully
      * Identify key requirements:
    * Text type
    * Target audience
    * Purpose
    * Theme

<callout type=""></callout>

### During Writing


  * Use appropriate connecting words
  * Vary sentence structures
  * Maintain consistent register
  * Include relevant cultural references

<callout type=""></callout>

### Final Checks


  1. Content relevance
  2. Format consistency
  3. Grammar and spelling
  4. Word count

## Key Differences Between SL and HL


### Standard Level (SL)


  * Basic text types
  * Straightforward language structures
  * Clear communication focus

### Higher Level (HL)


  * More complex text types
  * Sophisticated language use
  * Deeper cultural understanding
  * Higher word count requirement

<callout type=""></callout>

## Success Tips


### Language Enhancement


  * Read French newspapers and magazines
  * Watch French media
  * Practice writing different text types
  * Learn common idioms and expressions

### Time Management


  1. Reading and planning: 10 minutes
  2. Writing: 55 minutes
  3. Revision: 10 minutes

<callout type=""></callout>

### Common Text Type Features


  * Letters: Date, address, opening/closing formulas
  * Blogs: Informal tone, personal perspective
  * Reports: Headers, sections, formal language
  * Articles: Headline, byline, engaging introduction

<callout type=""></callout>
